input.tenant_message: The intercom unit inside my apartment hasn't been working for about three weeks. I can't hear when someone buzzes me from the front entrance and I have no way to let guests in remotely. I have to go all the way downstairs every time someone arrives which is really inconvenient, especially late at night.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule an intercom technician to inspect and repair the in-unit panel. Determine whether the issue is isolated to this unit or affects the building-wide system. Provide tenant with an estimated repair date within 5 business days.
